---
pagetitle: "Stan Q. He | Business Analytics"
description: "Stan Q. He is an MSBA candidate at UC San Diego focused on business analytics, product experimentation, and decision intelligence."
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
---

::: {.landing}
::: {.profile-column}
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/stanqhe/assets/main/profile/avatar_coastal-light.jpeg){.profile-image fig-alt="Stan Q. He"}
:::

::: {.contact-links aria-label="Contact links"}
[<i class="bi bi-github" aria-hidden="true"></i><span>GitHub</span>](https://github.com/stanqhe){.contact-link target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
[<i class="bi bi-linkedin" aria-hidden="true"></i><span>LinkedIn</span>](https://www.linkedin.com/in/stanqhe){.contact-link target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"}
[<i class="bi bi-envelope" aria-hidden="true"></i><span>Email</span>](mailto:stan.q.he@outlook.com){.contact-link}
:::

# Stan Q. He

::: {.focus-line}
MSBA Candidate at UC San Diego · Exploring AI, analytics & product strategy for better digital life
:::

I am a Master of Science in Business Analytics candidate at UC San Diego, building at the intersection of analytics, product, and business strategy. 

Before graduate school, I built experience across PwC, Deloitte, and KPMG, where I developed a strong foundation in analytical thinking, business communication, and structured execution. 

My current work focuses on applying analytics, experimentation, and decision-oriented modeling to turn data into clear business insight. I am especially interested in roles at the intersection of analytics, product, and strategy, where rigorous thinking, technical fluency, and thoughtful communication can create meaningful impact.

:::
